summary: Comprehensive testing of B2B Plywood/Timber ordering system. Backend: 100% pass (15/16 tests, 1 skipped). Frontend: Admin Panel and Customer Portal both functional. Fixed critical bug in /api/admin endpoint that was blocking Orders and Customers pages.

issues: Shows 0 Total Orders - using old orders collection instead of orders_v2

passed_tests: Customer dashboard loads with order counts and spend
Product Catalog shows Plywood and Timber products with Order Now buttons
Products have cascading dropdown options (thickness, sizes)
Order creates both order AND invoice simultaneously
Split billing - mixed Plywood+Timber creates 2 orders and 2 invoices
Admin can update order prices before approval
Orders list shows pending orders first
Customers list shows pending customers first
Admin Dashboard V2 shows latest Plywood and Timber orders separately
Product analytics endpoint works with filters
Admin Panel Orders page loads with 18 orders
Admin Panel Customers page loads with tier information
action_items: Admin Dashboard 'Total Orders' card shows 0 - should query orders_v2 collection instead of orders
Consider adding data-testid to transport modal elements for better test automation
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: /api/admin endpoint was missing resource=orders and resource=customers handlers - added support for these resources
JWT secret key warning - should use 32+ bytes key for production (current: 22 bytes)
CSS @import warnings in frontend logs - should move Google Fonts import to top of CSS
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added orders, customers, invoices resource handlers to /api/admin endpoint

success_rate.backend: 100% (15/16 tests passed, 1 skipped - no confirmed orders to test)
success_rate.frontend: 95% - All pages load and function correctly, minor dashboard stat issue

seed_data_creation: Used existing demo data initialized by server.py startup - includes 6 customers with different tiers, 6 products (Plywood and Timber)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs fully functional. Admin Panel and Customer Portal both working. Key features verified: order+invoice creation, split billing, admin price updates, pending-first sorting, 6 pricing tiers. Transport popup exists in FastOrder.tsx but automated testing had difficulty with cascading dropdown interactions - manual testing recommended for transport modal flow.

features_verified.Order Creation with Invoice: ✓ Orders create invoices immediately when placed
features_verified.Split Billing: ✓ Mixed Plywood+Timber orders create 2 separate orders and 2 invoices
features_verified.Admin Price Update: ✓ Admin can modify order prices before approval via PUT /api/admin/orders/{id}/items
features_verified.Pending First Sorting: ✓ Both orders and customers lists show pending items first
features_verified.Transport Details: ✓ Orders store transport_mode, vehicle_number, driver_name, driver_phone
features_verified.Product Catalog: ✓ Shows Plywood and Timber products with Order Now links

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/orders/v2 - Orders list with pending first
GET /api/customers - Customers list with pending first
